summary: Describes the step-by-step process for onboarding new suppliers into the Ivalua platform.
content:
Supplier onboarding involves multiple steps:

1. Initial Registration
- Enter supplier basic information
- Validate company details
- Check for duplicates

2. Data Validation
- Verify tax IDs and legal information
- Validate contact details
- Check banking information

3. Approval Workflow
- Submit for manager approval
- Risk assessment
- Compliance checks

4. Activation
- Final approval
- System activation
- Notification to supplier

sections.title: Initial Registration
sections.content: Enter supplier basic information, validate company details, check for duplicates.

sections.title: Data Validation
sections.content: Verify tax IDs and legal information, validate contact details, check banking information.
